[Home](https://www.banners.com/home) 2. [Canopy Tents](https://www.banners.com/custom-canopy-tents) 3. [10' Aluminum Canopy Tent](https://www.banners.com/10-foot-aluminum-tent-silver) 4. Custom Canopy Tent Kit | 10' Tent Complete Set | Banners.com # Premium 10' Custom Canopy Aluminum Tent Kit Looking for the complete set of everything that you need to make sure that your brand has great visibility at your next event? Make sure to grab the entire tent kit that you need! These customizable tents come with the canopy and hardware that you’ll need in order to ensure that you have protection from wind, UV Rays, and weather at any outdoor event. With waterproof and UV-resistant canopy fabric, our 10’ x 10’ custom fabric tents are perfect for your next promotional adventure. ![Premium 10' Custom Canopy Aluminum Tent Kit](https://lag.azureedge.net/product-images/e57f382f-4fc9-4b08-acef-40d36c287467.png) Material Choice: Premium 10' Custom Canopy Tent Cover Product: with Premium 10' Aluminum Tent Frame (Silver) Quantity: (Min: 1, Max: 1000) Size (H x W): 84.00" x 118.75" 84.00" x 118.75" ![Loading product options](/includes/Images/loadingBar.gif) Loading product options... Unit Price for Both: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) * [Features](#d66fdd62-1184-4955-be66-1e1a4ddf8f8a) * [Dimensions](#9aa96e7a-af89-49b8-8691-c78719654731) * [Templates](#b5070403-5432-4315-b90d-fadf84813d07) * [Shipping](#33c86fef-a9cd-4fe9-982e-0e0f6f1e1c45) * [Production](#6839b296-5949-4cbc-82fe-4faf0bead594) * [Product Images](#e5310305-7012-49c8-b23f-013678e459ee) Template Design Template Design Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) ![Upload a File](https://lag.azureedge.net/banners-site-layout/ico-04.png) Upload a File Upload a File Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) Professional Designer Let Us Design Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) ### Features _Canopy Features:_ * Constructed of durable, weather-resistant 600 denier polyester * Artwork is full-color dye sublimated on white canopy fabric * Crank-up canopy creates a taut, clean peak _Frame Features:_ * Constructed of 1.2 mm anondized aluminum * Features ABS glass-filled nylon joints * Hexagon shaped-legs at 1.75" in diameter * Legs feature plastic levers for pinch-free height adjustment _Additional Features:_ * Easily collapses to fit inside the included soft case with wheels * Can be secured to the ground with the stake kit (must be secured to prevent wind damage — failure to secure tent in high winds will void warranty) * Includes a rope and stake kit for easy securing to the ground on windy days [Create Your Product](#cust) ### Product Dimensions * Installed Size: 120" W x 137" H x 120" D * Collapsed Size: 9.12" W x 62.75" H x 9.12" D * Case Dimensions: 12.5" W x 56.25" H x 15.5" D [Create Your Product](#cust) ### 10' x 10' Canopy Tent Templates 10' x 10' Canopy TentTemplates [**EPS**](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-06-BANS-4x8 Lind Frame template.eps) [![](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/10x10ft Canopy Template.eps)10 x 10 Canopy Tent EPS Template](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/10x10ft Canopy Template.eps) [**PDF**](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-06-BANS-4x8 Lind Frame template.pdf) [![](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/10x10ft canopy template (1).pdf)10 x 10 Canopy Tent PDF Template](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/10x10ft canopy template \(1\).pdf) [Create Your Product](#cust) ### Shipping Process Due to the large nature of this product, it can only be shipped via UPS G
